_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Although WT and Nf1+/− mice have similar body weight, Nf1+/− mice display an altered body composition as determined by NMR.
details: Similar body weight to WT mice despite altered body composition
